name: Zali's Pack | Wolfs Rain
description:
Bot featuring one of the wolf packs from the anime Wolf's Rain

features : Zali, Cole, Moss, Gramps, and should add some of the unnamed pack members as well~

may make a bot for Kiba, Tsume, Hige, Toboe, Blue etc, i just had a lil brain scenario with an old oc i rediscovered n wanted to rp so i made this bot to do so aha

(i will add an intro message at somepoint, for now its an empty starting scenario)

(also made the pfp myself, found the episode n took two screenshots n merged em -to include moss- and did a lil colour adjusting to make the others have slightly different shades rather than all being the same brown just to make it a bit nicer :3)
